case_title: MALINDA KAI TUAZON VS. FRED MACKOTA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-20-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-20-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: SASHA CUMMINGS. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TUAZON, MALINDA KAI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MACKOTA, FRED $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,252.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-20-2009 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK: V. MU IN ROOM 103)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MACKOTA, FRED
